item.title: 设置hostname，避免DHCP修改hostname
item.author: entropydecrease
item.description: It can be annoying to see my hostname being modifed each time I connect to a different WIFI. It is because the hostname was never set. > scutil --get HostName HostName: not set So we just need to set the hostname: > sudo scutil --set HostName "new_hostname" Password: > scutil --get HostName new_hostname
